untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on calendar-based seasonal entry/exit (specific dates: Feb 25 entry, Apr 15 exit) and contract-specific logic (June NYMEX NG futures expiry). The indicator set does not support date-based conditions or contract-expiry selection logic. Seasonal regime detection (SEASONAL_SUMMER_DEMAND) is not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list. This requires custom calendar/contract-aware logic outside standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a pure calendar-driven seasonal trade with no technical indicator entry/exit conditions. Entry is tied to purchasing a specific contract (June NG) on a fixed date (Feb 25), and exit is on a fixed date (Apr 15). The backtest engine would need to support: (1) date-based condition evaluation, (2) contract selection/rolling logic, (3) seasonal regime classification. Standard OHLCV indicators cannot express this intent.
